subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabl-i-Báqir! Hearken unto the Call from these precincts wherein tribulations have encompassed the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قبل باقر ان استمع الندآء من شطر الذی احاطته البلاء من السدره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @murder; causing physical harm
